disabled.description: Current release-safe mode; gameplay remains independent of a cloud backend.

local.description: Supabase CLI stack for developers only; bind to localhost and never expose publicly.

supabase.description: Direct managed Supabase with project-owned migrations and deployment controls.

lovable-supabase.description: Lovable frontend workflow using the same Supabase schema, Auth, and RLS policies.

releaseGate: local migration reset and RLS tests pass
separate staging project passes account and save E2E
production redirect URLs and email templates approved
MFA required for maintainers and leaked-password protection enabled
backup, restore, deletion, privacy, and incident procedures approved
no service-role or database secret is present in browser artifacts
PUBLIC_CLOUD_FEATURES_ENABLED changed only through reviewed release configuration
